narrative:
London 1-A (precinct in Madison County) has 446 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
